revision.text:
'''己未'''（つちのとひつじ、きび）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
[[甲子]]から数えて56番目で、前は[[戊午]]、次は[[庚申]]である。[[十干]]の[[五行思想|五行]]は土、[[十二支]]の五行は土で、[[五行思想#比和|比和]]である。
==己未の年==
==己未の日== ===[[選日]]=== 己未の日は[[八専]]の5日目（間日を除く）である。

revision.text:
{{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''己未'''（つちのとひつじ、きどのひつじ、きび）は、[[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive]]の一つ。
Sexagenary cycle comprehensiveの組み合わせの56番目で、前は[[戊午]]、次は[[庚申]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[己]]は陰の[[土]]、[[十二支]]の[[未]]は陰の[[土]]で、[[五行思想#比和（ひわ）|比和]]である。
==己未の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って59が余る年が己未の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''己未の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[59年]] *[[119年]] *[[179年]] *[[239年]] *[[299年]] *[[359年]] *[[419年]] *[[479年]] *[[539年]] *[[599年]] *[[659年]] *[[719年]] *[[779年]] *[[839年]] *[[899年]] *[[959年]] | *[[1019年]] *[[1079年]] *[[1139年]] *[[1199年]] *[[1259年]] *[[1319年]] *[[1379年]] *[[1439年]] *[[1499年]] *[[1559年]] *[[1619年]] *[[1679年]] *[[1739年]] *[[1799年]] *[[1859年]] *[[1919年]] *[[1979年]] | *[[2039年]] *[[2099年]] *[[2159年]] *[[2219年]] *[[2279年]] *[[2339年]] *[[2399年]] *[[2459年]] *[[2519年]] *[[2579年]] *[[2639年]] *[[2699年]] *[[2759年]] *[[2819年]] *[[2879年]] *[[2939年]] *[[2999年]] |}
==己未の月== 西暦年の下1桁が3・8（十干が[[癸]]・[[戊]]）の年の[[6月]]が己未の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただし、ここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[小暑]]から[[立秋]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==己未の日== 己未の日の[[選日]]は以下の通り。 ===選日=== 己未の日は[[八専]]の5日目（間日を除く）である。 ==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{DEFAULTSORT:つちのとひつし}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle comprehensive]][[ja:己未]] [[Category:pages of uncertain originality]] [[Category:pages of uncertain originality]]

==己未の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って59が余る年が己未の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''己未の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[59年]] *[[119年]] *[[179年]] *[[239年]] *[[299年]] *[[359年]] *[[419年]] *[[479年]] *[[539年]] *[[599年]] *[[659年]] *[[719年]] *[[779年]] *[[839年]] *[[899年]] *[[959年]] | *[[1019年]] *[[1079年]] *[[1139年]] *[[1199年]] *[[1259年]] *[[1319年]] *[[1379年]] *[[1439年]] *[[1499年]] *[[1559年]] *[[1619年]] *[[1679年]] *[[1739年]] *[[1799年]] *[[1859年]] *[[1919年]] *[[1979年]] | *[[2039年]] *[[2099年]] *[[2159年]] *[[2219年]] *[[2279年]] *[[2339年]] *[[2399年]] *[[2459年]] *[[2519年]] *[[2579年]] *[[2639年]] *[[2699年]] *[[2759年]] *[[2819年]] *[[2879年]] *[[2939年]] *[[2999年]] |}
==己未の月== 西暦年の下1桁が3・8（十干が[[癸]]・[[戊]]）の年の[[6月]]が己未の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただし、ここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[小暑]]から[[立秋]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==己未の日== 己未の日の[[選日]]は以下の通り。 ===選日=== 己未の日は[[八専]]の5日目（間日を除く）である。 ==See Also== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{citation needed|つちのとひつし}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[ja:己未]] [[Category:pages of uncertain originality]] [[Category:pages of uncertain originality]] [[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]][[sn:Yin Earth Goat]][[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Earth Goat]][[Category:qq]]

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Earth Goat|kanji=己未|romaji=tsuchinoto hitsuji|onyomi=kibi|p=jǐwèi|w=chi-wei|mi=t͡ɕi³⁵ weɪ̯|y=gei2 mei6|j=gei2 mei6|ci=kei mei|mc=kɨj mei|oc-bs=kɯʔ mei}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Earth Goat also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> 己未'''（つちのとひつじ、きどのひつじ、きび）は、[[Sexagenary cycle]]の一つ。
Sexagenary cycleの組み合わせの56番目で、前は[[戊午]]、次は[[庚申]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[己]]は陰の[[土]]、[[十二支]]の[[未]]は陰の[[土]]で、[[五行思想#比和（ひわ）|比和]]である。
==己未の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って59が余る年が己未の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''己未の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[59年]] *[[119年]] *[[179年]] *[[239年]] *[[299年]] *[[359年]] *[[419年]] *[[479年]] *[[539年]] *[[599年]] *[[659年]] *[[719年]] *[[779年]] *[[839年]] *[[899年]] *[[959年]] | *[[1019年]] *[[1079年]] *[[1139年]] *[[1199年]] *[[1259年]] *[[1319年]] *[[1379年]] *[[1439年]] *[[1499年]] *[[1559年]] *[[1619年]] *[[1679年]] *[[1739年]] *[[1799年]] *[[1859年]] *[[1919年]] *[[1979年]] | *[[2039年]] *[[2099年]] *[[2159年]] *[[2219年]] *[[2279年]] *[[2339年]] *[[2399年]] *[[2459年]] *[[2519年]] *[[2579年]] *[[2639年]] *[[2699年]] *[[2759年]] *[[2819年]] *[[2879年]] *[[2939年]] *[[2999年]] |}

==己未の日== 己未の日の[[選日]]は以下の通り。 ===選日=== 己未の日は[[八専]]の5日目（間日を除く）である。 ==See Also== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{citation needed|つちのとひつし}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[ja:己未]] [[Category:pages of uncertain originality]] [[Category:pages of uncertain originality]] [[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]][[ja:己未]][[zh:己未]][[ko:기미]][[fr:Chèvre de terre]][[de:Erde-Schaf]][[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]] [[Category:qq]][[ja:己未]][[zh:己未]][[ko:기미]][[fr:Chèvre de terre]][[de:Erde-Schaf]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Yin Earth Goat]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:己未]][[zh:己未]][[ko:기미]][[fr:Chèvre de terre]][[de:Erde-Schaf]] [[sn:Yin Earth Goat]]

==己未の日== 己未の日の[[選日]]は以下の通り。 ===選日=== 己未の日は[[八専]]の5日目（間日を除く）である。 ==See Also== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{citation needed|つちのとひつし}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[ja:己未]] [[Category:pages of uncertain originality]] [[Category:pages of uncertain originality]] [[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]][[ja:己未]][[zh:己未]][[ko:기미]][[fr:Chèvre de terre]][[de:Erde-Schaf]][[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]] [[Category:qq]][[ja:己未]][[zh:己未]][[ko:기미]][[fr:Chèvre de terre]][[de:Erde-Schaf]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Yin Earth Goat]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:[[Category:Untranslated Lunar Calendar Days]]]] [[ja:己未]][[zh:己未]][[ko:기미]][[fr:Chèvre de terre]][[de:Erde-Schaf]] [[af:Vuurvark (astrologie)]][[cdo:Dĭng-cṳ̄de]][[de:Feuer-Schweineen]][[en:Fire Pig]][[fr:Cochon de feushak]][[it:Ding-chṳ́id]][[sn:ingmaoja]][[ko:정해]][[nds:Feuer-Varkvi]][[vi:Đinh Hợi]][[za:Dingceij]][[zh-min-nan:Teng-chik]][[zh-yue:丁亥]][[zh:丁亥]]

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Earth Goat|kanji=己未|romaji=tsuchinoto hitsuji|onyomi=kibi|p=jǐwèi|w=chi-wei|mi=t͡ɕi³⁵ weɪ̯|y=gei2 mei6|j=gei2 mei6|ci=kei mei|mc=kɨj mei|oc-bs=kɯʔ mei}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Earth Goat also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> 己未'''（つちのとひつじ、きどのひつじ、きび）は、[[Sexagenary cycle]]の一つ。
Sexagenary cycleの組み合わせの56番目で、前は[[戊午]]、次は[[庚申]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[己]]は陰の[[土]]、[[十二支]]の[[未]]は陰の[[土]]で、[[五行思想#比和（ひわ）|比和]]である。
==己未の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って59が余る年が己未の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''己未の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[59年]] *[[119年]] *[[179年]] *[[239年]] *[[299年]] *[[359年]] *[[419年]] *[[479年]] *[[539年]] *[[599年]] *[[659年]] *[[719年]] *[[779年]] *[[839年]] *[[899年]] *[[959年]] | *[[1019年]] *[[1079年]] *[[1139年]] *[[1199年]] *[[1259年]] *[[1319年]] *[[1379年]] *[[1439年]] *[[1499年]] *[[1559年]] *[[1619年]] *[[1679年]] *[[1739年]] *[[1799年]] *[[1859年]] *[[1919年]] *[[1979年]] | *[[2039年]] *[[2099年]] *[[2159年]] *[[2219年]] *[[2279年]] *[[2339年]] *[[2399年]] *[[2459年]] *[[2519年]] *[[2579年]] *[[2639年]] *[[2699年]] *[[2759年]] *[[2819年]] *[[2879年]] *[[2939年]] *[[2999年]] |}
==己未の月== 西暦年の下1桁が3・8（十干が[[癸]]・[[戊]]）の年の[[6月]]が己未の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただし、ここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[小暑]]から[[立秋]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==己未の日== 己未の日の[[選日]]は以下の通り。 ===選日=== 己未の日は[[八専]]の5日目（間日を除く）である。
==See Also== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{citation needed|つちのとひつし}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[ja:己未]] [[Category:pages of uncertain originality]] [[Category:pages of uncertain originality]] [[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]][[ja:己未]][[zh:己未]][[ko:기미]][[fr:Chèvre de terre]][[de:Erde-Schaf]][[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]] [[Category:qq]][[ja:己未]][[zh:己未]][[ko:기미]][[fr:Chèvre de terre]][[de:Erde-Schaf]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Yin Earth Goat]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:[[Category:Untranslated Lunar Calendar Days]]]] [[ja:己未]][[zh:己未]][[ko:기미]][[fr:Chèvre de terre]][[de:Erde-Schaf]] [[af:Vuurvark (astrologie)]][[cdo:Dĭng-cṳ̄de]][[de:Feuer-Schweineen]][[en:Fire Pig]][[fr:Cochon de feushak]][[it:Ding-chṳ́id]][[sn:ingmaoja]][[ko:정해]][[nds:Feuer-Varkvi]][[vi:Đinh Hợi]][[za:Dingceij]][[zh-min-nan:Teng-chik]][[zh-yue:丁亥]][[zh:丁亥]]

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q904801]] Wikidata name: Yin Earth Goat [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:30, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Earth Goat|kanji=己未|romaji=tsuchinoto hitsuji|onyomi=kibi|p=jǐwèi|w=chi-wei|mi=t͡ɕi³⁵ weɪ̯|y=gei2 mei6|j=gei2 mei6|ci=kei mei|mc=kɨj mei|oc-bs=kɯʔ mei|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Earth Goat also known as 己未''' (tsuchinotohitsuji, kidonohitsuji, kibi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 56th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bokugo|ja|1=Yang Earth Horse|2=ja|戊午|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bokugo|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bokugo|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Horse|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushin|ja|庚申|1=Kōshin|lt=Yang Metal Monkey|2=ja|3=庚申|4=zh|5=庚申|6=ko|7=경신|lt_ko=경신|8=fr|9=Singe de métal|10=de|11=Metall-Affe|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}. ==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Earth Goat (己未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-hitsuji ***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-hitsuji ***Onyomi 1: kibi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gimi (기미) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Mùi

==Months of Yin Earth Goat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:June|June]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Minor Heat]] until the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Earth Goat== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}} is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}} is the 5th day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} (excluding gap days). ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q904801]] Wikidata name: Yin Earth Goat [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:30, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Earth Goat|kanji=己未|romaji=tsuchinoto hitsuji|onyomi=kibi|p=jǐwèi|w=chi-wei|mi=t͡ɕi³⁵ weɪ̯|y=gei2 mei6|j=gei2 mei6|ci=kei mei|mc=kɨj mei|oc-bs=kɯʔ mei|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Earth Goat also known as 己未''' (tsuchinotohitsuji, kidonohitsuji, kibi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 56th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bokugo|ja|1=Yang Earth Horse|2=ja|戊午|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bokugo|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bokugo|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Horse|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushin|ja|庚申|1=Kōshin|lt=Yang Metal Monkey|2=ja|3=庚申|4=zh|5=庚申|6=ko|7=경신|lt_ko=경신|8=fr|9=Singe de métal|10=de|11=Metall-Affe|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Earth|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth ==Months of Yin Earth Goat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:June|June]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Minor Heat]] until the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Earth Goat== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}} is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}} is the 5th day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} (excluding gap days). ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q904801]] Wikidata name: Yin Earth Goat [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:30, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Earth Goat|kanji=己未|romaji=tsuchinoto hitsuji|onyomi=kibi|p=jǐwèi|w=chi-wei|mi=t͡ɕi³⁵ weɪ̯|y=gei2 mei6|j=gei2 mei6|ci=kei mei|mc=kɨj mei|oc-bs=kɯʔ mei|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Earth Goat also known as 己未''' (tsuchinotohitsuji, kidonohitsuji, kibi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 56th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bokugo|ja|1=Yang Earth Horse|2=ja|戊午|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bokugo|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bokugo|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Horse|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushin|ja|庚申|1=Kōshin|lt=Yang Metal Monkey|2=ja|3=庚申|4=zh|5=庚申|6=ko|7=경신|lt_ko=경신|8=fr|9=Singe de métal|10=de|11=Metall-Affe|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto ==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Earth Goat (己未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-hitsuji ***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-hitsuji ***Onyomi 1: kibi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gimi (기미) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Mùi

==Months of Yin Earth Goat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:June|June]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Minor Heat]] until the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Earth Goat== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}} is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}} is the 5th day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} (excluding gap days). ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 56th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bokugo|ja|1=Yang Earth Horse|2=ja|戊午|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bokugo|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bokugo|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Horse|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushin|ja|庚申|1=Kōshin|lt=Yang Metal Monkey|2=ja|3=庚申|4=zh|5=庚申|6=ko|7=경신|lt_ko=경신|8=fr|9=Singe de métal|10=de|11=Metall-Affe|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements ==Months of Yin Earth Goat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:June|June]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Minor Heat]] until the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Earth Goat== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}} is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}} is the 5th day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} (excluding gap days). ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

==Months of Yin Earth Goat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:June|June]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Minor Heat]] until the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Earth Goat== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}} is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}} is the 5th day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} (excluding gap days). ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

==Months of Yin Earth Goat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:June|June]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Minor Heat]] until the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Earth Goat== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}} is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}} is the 5th day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} (excluding gap days). ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

==Months of Yin Earth Goat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:June|June]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Minor Heat]] until the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Earth Goat== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}} is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}} is the 5th day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} (excluding gap days). ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

==Months of Yin Earth Goat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:June|June]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Minor Heat]] until the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Earth Goat== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}} is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}} is the 5th day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} (excluding gap days). ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 56th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bokugo|ja|1=Yang Earth Horse|2=ja|戊午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bokugo|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bokugo|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushin|ja|庚申|1=Kōshin|lt=Yang Metal Monkey|2=ja|3=庚申|4=zh|5=庚申|6=ko|7=경신|lt_ko=경신|8=fr|9=Singe de métal|10=de|11=Metall-Affe|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements ==Months of Yin Earth Goat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:June|June]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Minor Heat]] until the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Earth Goat== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}} is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}} is the 5th day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} (excluding gap days). ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Earth Goat (己未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-hitsuji ***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-hitsuji ***Onyomi 1: kibi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gimi (기미) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Mùi

==Months of Yin Earth Goat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:June|June]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Minor Heat]] until the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Earth Goat== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}} is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}} is the 5th day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} (excluding gap days). ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Aardbok (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gī-ê]][[de:Erde-Schaf]][[hak:Kí-vi]][[ja:己未]][[ko:기미]][[vi:Kỷ Mùi]][[za:Geijmeih]][[zh-min-nan:Kí-bī]][[zh-yue:己未]][[zh:己未]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q904801]] Wikidata name: Yin Earth Goat [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:30, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Earth Goat|kanji=己未|romaji=tsuchinoto hitsuji|onyomi=kibi|p=jǐwèi|w=chi-wei|mi=t͡ɕi³⁵ weɪ̯|y=gei2 mei6|j=gei2 mei6|ci=kei mei|mc=kɨj mei|oc-bs=kɯʔ mei|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Earth Goat also known as 己未''' (tsuchinotohitsuji, kidonohitsuji, kibi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 56th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bokugo|ja|1=Yang Earth Horse|2=ja|戊午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bokugo|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bokugo|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushin|ja|庚申|1=Kōshin|lt=Yang Metal Monkey|2=ja|3=庚申|4=zh|5=庚申|6=ko|7=경신|lt_ko=경신|8=fr|9=Singe de métal|10=de|11=Metall-Affe|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Earth|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr ==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Earth Goat (己未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-hitsuji ***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-hitsuji ***Onyomi 1: kibi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gimi (기미) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Mùi

==Months of Yin Earth Goat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:June|June]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Minor Heat]] until the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Earth Goat== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}} is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}} is the 5th day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} (excluding gap days). ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 56th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bokugo|ja|1=Yang Earth Horse|2=ja|戊午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bokugo|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bokugo|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushin|ja|庚申|1=Kōshin|lt=Yang Metal Monkey|2=ja|3=庚申|4=zh|5=庚申|6=ko|7=경신|lt_ko=경신|8=fr|9=Singe de métal|10=de|11=Metall-Affe|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Stems]] symbol {{ill|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto ==Months of Yin Earth Goat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:June|June]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Minor Heat]] until the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Earth Goat== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}} is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}} is the 5th day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} (excluding gap days). ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Aardbok (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gī-ê]][[de:Erde-Schaf]][[hak:Kí-vi]][[ja:己未]][[ko:기미]][[vi:Kỷ Mùi]][[za:Geijmeih]][[zh-min-nan:Kí-bī]][[zh-yue:己未]][[zh:己未]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q904801]] Wikidata name: Yin Earth Goat [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:30, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Earth Goat|kanji=己未|romaji=tsuchinoto hitsuji|onyomi=kibi|p=jǐwèi|w=chi-wei|mi=t͡ɕi³⁵ weɪ̯|y=gei2 mei6|j=gei2 mei6|ci=kei mei|mc=kɨj mei|oc-bs=kɯʔ mei|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Earth Goat also known as 己未''' (tsuchinotohitsuji, kidonohitsuji, kibi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 56th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bokugo|ja|1=Yang Earth Horse|2=ja|戊午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bokugo|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bokugo|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushin|ja|庚申|1=Kōshin|lt=Yang Metal Monkey|2=ja|3=庚申|4=zh|5=庚申|6=ko|7=경신|lt_ko=경신|8=fr|9=Singe de métal|10=de|11=Metall-Affe|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Earth|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth ==Months of Yin Earth Goat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:June|June]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Minor Heat]] until the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Earth Goat== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}} is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}} is the 5th day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} (excluding gap days). ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 56th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bokugo|ja|1=Yang Earth Horse|2=ja|戊午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bokugo|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bokugo|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushin|ja|庚申|1=Kōshin|lt=Yang Metal Monkey|2=ja|3=庚申|4=zh|5=庚申|6=ko|7=경신|lt_ko=경신|8=fr|9=Singe de métal|10=de|11=Metall-Affe|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Minor Heat]] until the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]]) as applicable.

It is the 56th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bokugo|ja|1=Yang Earth Horse|2=ja|戊午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bokugo|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bokugo|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushin|ja|庚申|1=Kōshin|lt=Yang Metal Monkey|2=ja|3=庚申|4=zh|5=庚申|6=ko|7=경신|lt_ko=경신|8=fr|9=Singe de métal|10=de|11=Metall-Affe|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements ==Months of Yin Earth Goat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:June|June]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Minor Heat]] until the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Earth Goat== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}} is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}} is the 5th day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} (excluding gap days). ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

==Months of Yin Earth Goat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:June|June]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Minor Heat]] until the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Earth Goat== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}} is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}} is the 5th day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} (excluding gap days). ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Earth Goat (己未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-hitsuji ***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-hitsuji ***Onyomi 1: kibi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gimi (기미) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Mùi

==Months of Yin Earth Goat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:June|June]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Minor Heat]] until the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Earth Goat== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}} is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}} is the 5th day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} (excluding gap days). ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Aardbok (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gī-ê]][[de:Erde-Schaf]][[hak:Kí-vi]][[ja:己未]][[ko:기미]][[vi:Kỷ Mùi]][[za:Geijmeih]][[zh-min-nan:Kí-bī]][[zh-yue:己未]][[zh:己未]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q904801]] Wikidata name: Yin Earth Goat [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:30, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Earth Goat|kanji=己未|romaji=tsuchinoto hitsuji|onyomi=kibi|p=jǐwèi|w=chi-wei|mi=t͡ɕi³⁵ weɪ̯|y=gei2 mei6|j=gei2 mei6|ci=kei mei|mc=kɨj mei|oc-bs=kɯʔ mei|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Earth Goat also known as 己未''' (tsuchinotohitsuji, kidonohitsuji, kibi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 56th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bokugo|ja|1=Yang Earth Horse|2=ja|戊午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bokugo|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bokugo|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushin|ja|庚申|1=Kōshin|lt=Yang Metal Monkey|2=ja|3=庚申|4=zh|5=庚申|6=ko|7=경신|lt_ko=경신|8=fr|9=Singe de métal|10=de|11=Metall-Affe|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Earth|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth ==Months of Yin Earth Goat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:June|June]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Minor Heat]] until the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Earth Goat== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}} is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}} is the 5th day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} (excluding gap days). ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

==Months of Yin Earth Goat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:June|June]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Minor Heat]] until the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Earth Goat== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}} is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}} is the 5th day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} (excluding gap days). ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Aardbok (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gī-ê]][[de:Erde-Schaf]][[hak:Kí-vi]][[ja:己未]][[ko:기미]][[vi:Kỷ Mùi]][[za:Geijmeih]][[zh-min-nan:Kí-bī]][[zh-yue:己未]][[zh:己未]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q904801]] Wikidata name: Yin Earth Goat [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:30, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Earth Goat|kanji=己未|romaji=tsuchinoto hitsuji|onyomi=kibi|p=jǐwèi|w=chi-wei|mi=t͡ɕi³⁵ weɪ̯|y=gei2 mei6|j=gei2 mei6|ci=kei mei|mc=kɨj mei|oc-bs=kɯʔ mei|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Earth Goat also known as 己未''' (tsuchinotohitsuji, kidonohitsuji, kibi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 56th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bokugo|ja|1=Yang Earth Horse|2=ja|戊午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bokugo|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bokugo|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushin|ja|庚申|1=Kōshin|lt=Yang Metal Monkey|2=ja|3=庚申|4=zh|5=庚申|6=ko|7=경신|lt_ko=경신|8=fr|9=Singe de métal|10=de|11=Metall-Affe|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Earth|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr ==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Earth Goat (己未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-hitsuji ***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-hitsuji ***Onyomi 1: kibi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gimi (기미) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Mùi

==Months of Yin Earth Goat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:June|June]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Minor Heat]] until the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Earth Goat== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}} is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}} is the 5th day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} (excluding gap days). ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Aardbok (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gī-ê]][[de:Erde-Schaf]][[hak:Kí-vi]][[ja:己未]][[ko:기미]][[vi:Kỷ Mùi]][[za:Geijmeih]][[zh-min-nan:Kí-bī]][[zh-yue:己未]][[zh:己未]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q904801]] Wikidata name: Yin Earth Goat [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:30, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Earth Goat|kanji=己未|romaji=tsuchinoto hitsuji|onyomi=kibi|p=jǐwèi|w=chi-wei|mi=t͡ɕi³⁵ weɪ̯|y=gei2 mei6|j=gei2 mei6|ci=kei mei|mc=kɨj mei|oc-bs=kɯʔ mei|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}} '''Yin Earth Goat also known as 己未''' (tsuchinotohitsuji, kidonohitsuji, kibi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 56th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bokugo|ja|1=Yang Earth Horse|2=ja|戊午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bokugo|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bokugo|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushin|ja|庚申|1=Kōshin|lt=Yang Metal Monkey|2=ja|3=庚申|4=zh|5=庚申|6=ko|7=경신|lt_ko=경신|8=fr|9=Singe de métal|10=de|11=Metall-Affe|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Earth|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr ==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Earth Goat (己未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-hitsuji ***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-hitsuji ***Onyomi 1: kibi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gimi (기미) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Mùi

==Months of Yin Earth Goat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:June|June]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Minor Heat]] until the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Earth Goat== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}} is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}} is the 5th day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} (excluding gap days). ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 56th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bokugo|ja|1=Yang Earth Horse|2=ja|戊午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bokugo|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bokugo|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushin|ja|庚申|1=Kōshin|lt=Yang Metal Monkey|2=ja|3=庚申|4=zh|5=庚申|6=ko|7=경신|lt_ko=경신|8=fr|9=Singe de métal|10=de|11=Metall-Affe|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Earth|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr ==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Earth Goat (己未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-hitsuji ***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-hitsuji ***Onyomi 1: kibi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gimi (기미) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Mùi
<!-- == * Yin Earth Goat (己未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: つちのとひつじ (tsuchinoto-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: きかのひつじ (kika-no-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: きび (kibi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gimi ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Mùi
--> ==Years of Yin Earth Goat== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 59 when divided by 60 is a [[:en:Year|year]] of {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}}. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Earth Goat (己未)'s years table''' |- ! However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Minor Heat]] until the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]]) as applicable.
