It is the 56th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bokugo|ja|1=Yang Earth Horse|2=ja|戊午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bokugo|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bokugo|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushin|ja|庚申|1=Kōshin|lt=Yang Metal Monkey|2=ja|3=庚申|4=zh|5=庚申|6=ko|7=경신|lt_ko=경신|8=fr|9=Singe de métal|10=de|11=Metall-Affe|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto ==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Earth Goat (己未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-hitsuji ***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-hitsuji ***Onyomi 1: kibi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gimi (기미) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Mùi

==Months of Yin Earth Goat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:June|June]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Minor Heat]] until the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Earth Goat== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}} is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}} is the 5th day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} (excluding gap days). ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

==Months of Yin Earth Goat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:June|June]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Minor Heat]] until the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Earth Goat== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}} is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}} is the 5th day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} (excluding gap days). ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

==Months of Yin Earth Goat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:June|June]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Minor Heat]] until the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Earth Goat== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}} is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}} is the 5th day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} (excluding gap days). ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 56th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bokugo|ja|1=Yang Earth Horse|2=ja|戊午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bokugo|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bokugo|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushin|ja|庚申|1=Kōshin|lt=Yang Metal Monkey|2=ja|3=庚申|4=zh|5=庚申|6=ko|7=경신|lt_ko=경신|8=fr|9=Singe de métal|10=de|11=Metall-Affe|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements ==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Earth Goat (己未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-hitsuji ***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-hitsuji ***Onyomi 1: kibi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gimi (기미) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Mùi

==Months of Yin Earth Goat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:June|June]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Minor Heat]] until the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Earth Goat== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}} is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}} is the 5th day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} (excluding gap days). ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 56th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bokugo|ja|1=Yang Earth Horse|2=ja|戊午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bokugo|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bokugo|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushin|ja|庚申|1=Kōshin|lt=Yang Metal Monkey|2=ja|3=庚申|4=zh|5=庚申|6=ko|7=경신|lt_ko=경신|8=fr|9=Singe de métal|10=de|11=Metall-Affe|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto ==Months of Yin Earth Goat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:June|June]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Minor Heat]] until the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Earth Goat== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}} is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}} is the 5th day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} (excluding gap days). ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 56th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bokugo|ja|1=Yang Earth Horse|2=ja|戊午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bokugo|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bokugo|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushin|ja|庚申|1=Kōshin|lt=Yang Metal Monkey|2=ja|3=庚申|4=zh|5=庚申|6=ko|7=경신|lt_ko=경신|8=fr|9=Singe de métal|10=de|11=Metall-Affe|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly ==Months of Yin Earth Goat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:June|June]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Minor Heat]] until the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Earth Goat== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}} is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}} is the 5th day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} (excluding gap days). ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 56th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bokugo|ja|1=Yang Earth Horse|2=ja|戊午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bokugo|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bokugo|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushin|ja|庚申|1=Kōshin|lt=Yang Metal Monkey|2=ja|3=庚申|4=zh|5=庚申|6=ko|7=경신|lt_ko=경신|8=fr|9=Singe de métal|10=de|11=Metall-Affe|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly ==Months of Yin Earth Goat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:June|June]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Minor Heat]] until the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Earth Goat== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}} is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}} is the 5th day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} (excluding gap days). ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 56th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bokugo|ja|1=Yang Earth Horse|2=ja|戊午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bokugo|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bokugo|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushin|ja|庚申|1=Kōshin|lt=Yang Metal Monkey|2=ja|3=庚申|4=zh|5=庚申|6=ko|7=경신|lt_ko=경신|8=fr|9=Singe de métal|10=de|11=Metall-Affe|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements ==Months of Yin Earth Goat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:June|June]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Minor Heat]] until the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Earth Goat== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}} is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}} is the 5th day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} (excluding gap days). ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 56th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bokugo|ja|1=Yang Earth Horse|2=ja|戊午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bokugo|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bokugo|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushin|ja|庚申|1=Kōshin|lt=Yang Metal Monkey|2=ja|3=庚申|4=zh|5=庚申|6=ko|7=경신|lt_ko=경신|8=fr|9=Singe de métal|10=de|11=Metall-Affe|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Earth|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth ==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Earth Goat (己未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-hitsuji ***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-hitsuji ***Onyomi 1: kibi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gimi (기미) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Mùi

==Months of Yin Earth Goat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:June|June]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Minor Heat]] until the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]]) as applicable.

It is the 56th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bokugo|ja|1=Yang Earth Horse|2=ja|戊午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bokugo|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bokugo|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushin|ja|庚申|1=Kōshin|lt=Yang Metal Monkey|2=ja|3=庚申|4=zh|5=庚申|6=ko|7=경신|lt_ko=경신|8=fr|9=Singe de métal|10=de|11=Metall-Affe|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements ==Months of Yin Earth Goat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:June|June]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Minor Heat]] until the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Earth Goat== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}} is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}} is the 5th day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} (excluding gap days). ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 56th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bokugo|ja|1=Yang Earth Horse|2=ja|戊午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bokugo|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bokugo|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushin|ja|庚申|1=Kōshin|lt=Yang Metal Monkey|2=ja|3=庚申|4=zh|5=庚申|6=ko|7=경신|lt_ko=경신|8=fr|9=Singe de métal|10=de|11=Metall-Affe|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements ==Months of Yin Earth Goat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:June|June]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Minor Heat]] until the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Earth Goat== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}} is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}} is the 5th day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} (excluding gap days). ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 56th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bokugo|ja|1=Yang Earth Horse|2=ja|戊午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bokugo|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bokugo|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushin|ja|庚申|1=Kōshin|lt=Yang Metal Monkey|2=ja|3=庚申|4=zh|5=庚申|6=ko|7=경신|lt_ko=경신|8=fr|9=Singe de métal|10=de|11=Metall-Affe|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Earth|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth ==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Earth Goat (己未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-hitsuji ***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-hitsuji ***Onyomi 1: kibi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gimi (기미) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Mùi

==Months of Yin Earth Goat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:June|June]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Xiaoshu|Minor Heat]] until the day before [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Earth Goat== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}} is as follows. === Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}} is the 5th day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} (excluding gap days). ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Earth Goat also known as 己未''' (tsuchinotohitsuji, kidonohitsuji, kibi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 56th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bokugo|ja|1=Yang Earth Horse|2=ja|戊午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bokugo|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bokugo|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushin|ja|庚申|1=Kōshin|lt=Yang Metal Monkey|2=ja|3=庚申|4=zh|5=庚申|6=ko|7=경신|lt_ko=경신|8=fr|9=Singe de métal|10=de|11=Metall-Affe|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Earth|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐwèi
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 mei6
**  Japanese:

***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-hitsuji
***Onyomi 1: kibi
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gimi (기미)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Mùi

==Months of Yin Earth Goat==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|June|en|June|WD=Q120|lt=June}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)}} of {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Xiaoshu|en|Xiaoshu|WD=Q1190976|lt=Minor Heat}} until the day before {{ill|Liqiu|en|Liqiu|WD=Q1147421|lt=Beginning of Autumn}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yin Earth Goat==
The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}} is as follows.
=== Selected Day (選日) ===
The day of {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}} is the 5th day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} (excluding gap days).

{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Earth Goat also known as 己未''' (tsuchinotohitsuji, kidonohitsuji, kibi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 56th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bokugo|ja|1=Yang Earth Horse|2=ja|戊午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bokugo|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bokugo|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushin|ja|庚申|1=Kōshin|lt=Yang Metal Monkey|2=ja|3=庚申|4=zh|5=庚申|6=ko|7=경신|lt_ko=경신|8=fr|9=Singe de métal|10=de|11=Metall-Affe|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Earth|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Mùi

==Months of Yin Earth Goat==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|June|en|June|WD=Q120|lt=June}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)}} of {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Xiaoshu|en|Xiaoshu|WD=Q1190976|lt=Minor Heat}} until the day before {{ill|Liqiu|en|Liqiu|WD=Q1147421|lt=Beginning of Autumn}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yin Earth Goat==
The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}} is as follows.
=== Selected Day (選日) ===
The day of {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}} is the 5th day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} (excluding gap days).

'''Yin Earth Goat also known as 己未''' (tsuchinotohitsuji, kidonohitsuji, kibi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 56th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bokugo|ja|1=Yang Earth Horse|2=ja|戊午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bokugo|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bokugo|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushin|ja|庚申|1=Kōshin|lt=Yang Metal Monkey|2=ja|3=庚申|4=zh|5=庚申|6=ko|7=경신|lt_ko=경신|8=fr|9=Singe de métal|10=de|11=Metall-Affe|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Earth|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо ==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Earth Goat (己未)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐwèi
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 mei6
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-hitsuji
***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-hitsuji
***Onyomi 1: kibi
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gimi (기미)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Mùi

==Months of Yin Earth Goat==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|June|en|June|WD=Q120|lt=June}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)}} of {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Xiaoshu|en|Xiaoshu|WD=Q1190976|lt=Minor Heat}} until the day before {{ill|Liqiu|en|Liqiu|WD=Q1147421|lt=Beginning of Autumn}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yin Earth Goat==
The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}} is as follows.
=== Selected Day (選日) ===
The day of {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}} is the 5th day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} (excluding gap days).

{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Earth Goat also known as 己未''' (tsuchinotohitsuji, kidonohitsuji, kibi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 56th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bokugo|ja|1=Yang Earth Horse|2=ja|戊午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bokugo|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bokugo|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushin|ja|庚申|1=Kōshin|lt=Yang Metal Monkey|2=ja|3=庚申|4=zh|5=庚申|6=ko|7=경신|lt_ko=경신|8=fr|9=Singe de métal|10=de|11=Metall-Affe|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Earth|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо ==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Earth Goat (己未)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐwèi
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 mei6
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-hitsuji
***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-hitsuji
***Onyomi 1: kibi
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gimi (기미)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Mùi

==Months of Yin Earth Goat==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|June|en|June|WD=Q120|lt=June}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)}} of {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Xiaoshu|en|Xiaoshu|WD=Q1190976|lt=Minor Heat}} until the day before {{ill|Liqiu|en|Liqiu|WD=Q1147421|lt=Beginning of Autumn}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yin Earth Goat==
The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}} is as follows.
=== Selected Day (選日) ===
The day of {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}} is the 5th day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} (excluding gap days).

{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Earth Goat also known as 己未''' (tsuchinotohitsuji, kidonohitsuji, kibi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 56th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bokugo|ja|1=Yang Earth Horse|2=ja|戊午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bokugo|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bokugo|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushin|ja|庚申|1=Kōshin|lt=Yang Metal Monkey|2=ja|3=庚申|4=zh|5=庚申|6=ko|7=경신|lt_ko=경신|8=fr|9=Singe de métal|10=de|11=Metall-Affe|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Earth|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо ==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Earth Goat (己未)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐwèi
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 mei6
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-hitsuji
***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-hitsuji
***Onyomi 1: kibi
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gimi (기미)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Mùi

==Months of Yin Earth Goat==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|June|en|June|WD=Q120|lt=June}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)}} of {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Xiaoshu|en|Xiaoshu|WD=Q1190976|lt=Minor Heat}} until the day before {{ill|Liqiu|en|Liqiu|WD=Q1147421|lt=Beginning of Autumn}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yin Earth Goat==
The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}} is as follows.
=== Selected Day (選日) ===
The day of {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}} is the 5th day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} (excluding gap days).

{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Earth Goat also known as 己未''' (tsuchinotohitsuji, kidonohitsuji, kibi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 56th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bokugo|ja|1=Yang Earth Horse|2=ja|戊午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bokugo|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bokugo|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushin|ja|庚申|1=Kōshin|lt=Yang Metal Monkey|2=ja|3=庚申|4=zh|5=庚申|6=ko|7=경신|lt_ko=경신|8=fr|9=Singe de métal|10=de|11=Metall-Affe|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Earth|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Mùi

==Months of Yin Earth Goat==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|June|en|June|WD=Q120|lt=June|1=June}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)|1=Month}} of {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term|1=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Xiaoshu|en|Xiaoshu|WD=Q1190976|lt=Minor Heat|1=Xiaoshu}} until the day before {{ill|Liqiu|en|Liqiu|WD=Q1147421|lt=Beginning of Autumn|1=Liqiu}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yin Earth Goat==
The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}} is as follows.
=== Selected Day (選日) ===
The day of {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}} is the 5th day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} (excluding gap days).

'''Yin Earth Goat also known as 己未''' (tsuchinotohitsuji, kidonohitsuji, kibi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 56th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bokugo|ja|1=Yang Earth Horse|2=ja|戊午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bokugo|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bokugo|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushin|ja|庚申|1=Kōshin|lt=Yang Metal Monkey|2=ja|3=庚申|4=zh|5=庚申|6=ko|7=경신|lt_ko=경신|8=fr|9=Singe de métal|10=de|11=Metall-Affe|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Earth|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this ***Onyomi 1: kibi
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gimi (기미)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Mùi

==Months of Yin Earth Goat==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|June|en|June|WD=Q120|lt=June|1=June}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)|1=Month}} of {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term|1=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Xiaoshu|en|Xiaoshu|WD=Q1190976|lt=Minor Heat|1=Xiaoshu}} until the day before {{ill|Liqiu|en|Liqiu|WD=Q1147421|lt=Beginning of Autumn|1=Liqiu}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yin Earth Goat==
The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}} is as follows.
=== Selected Day (選日) ===
The day of {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}} is the 5th day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} (excluding gap days).

'''Yin Earth Goat also known as 己未''' (tsuchinotohitsuji, kidonohitsuji, kibi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 56th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bokugo|ja|1=Yang Earth Horse|2=ja|戊午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bokugo|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bokugo|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushin|ja|庚申|1=Kōshin|lt=Yang Metal Monkey|2=ja|3=庚申|4=zh|5=庚申|6=ko|7=경신|lt_ko=경신|8=fr|9=Singe de métal|10=de|11=Metall-Affe|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Earth|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо ==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Earth Goat (己未)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐwèi
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 mei6
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-hitsuji
***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-hitsuji
***Onyomi 1: kibi
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gimi (기미)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Mùi

==Months of Yin Earth Goat==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|June|en|June|WD=Q120|lt=June|1=June}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)|1=Month}} of {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term|1=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Xiaoshu|en|Xiaoshu|WD=Q1190976|lt=Minor Heat|1=Xiaoshu}} until the day before {{ill|Liqiu|en|Liqiu|WD=Q1147421|lt=Beginning of Autumn|1=Liqiu}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yin Earth Goat==
The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}} is as follows.
=== Selected Day (選日) ===
The day of {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}} is the 5th day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} (excluding gap days).

{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Earth Goat also known as 己未''' (tsuchinotohitsuji, kidonohitsuji, kibi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 56th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bokugo|ja|1=Yang Earth Horse|2=ja|戊午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bokugo|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bokugo|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushin|ja|庚申|1=Kōshin|lt=Yang Metal Monkey|2=ja|3=庚申|4=zh|5=庚申|6=ko|7=경신|lt_ko=경신|8=fr|9=Singe de métal|10=de|11=Metall-Affe|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Earth|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо ==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Earth Goat (己未)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐwèi
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 mei6
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-hitsuji
***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-hitsuji
***Onyomi 1: kibi
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gimi (기미)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Mùi

==Months of Yin Earth Goat==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|June|en|June|WD=Q120|lt=June|1=June}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)|1=Month}} of {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term|1=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Xiaoshu|en|Xiaoshu|WD=Q1190976|lt=Minor Heat|1=Xiaoshu}} until the day before {{ill|Liqiu|en|Liqiu|WD=Q1147421|lt=Beginning of Autumn|1=Liqiu}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yin Earth Goat==
The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}} is as follows.
=== Selected Day (選日) ===
The day of {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}} is the 5th day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} (excluding gap days).
